quick_skim.title: Lattice Configuration Generation with a Self-Learning Diffusion Model
quick_skim.abstract: We show that a diffusion sampler for lattice-field configurations can be trained without preparing training data by an external Monte Carlo calculation. Starting from exactly sampled configurations at $β=0$, we construct a self-bootstrap sampler, SLDiffusion, in which periodic Gaussian proposals with a fixed learned score are Metropolis--Hastings corrected, at each $β$, against the same physical target at every noise level, and only replay configurations from the resulting chain are used to train the score at the next stage. In the two-dimensional compact XY model, self-training proceeds from $β=0.30$ to $0.50$ at $L=4$. At $β=0.5$, the energy and vortex densities for $L=4,6,8,12$ agree with independent Hybrid Monte Carlo calculations within $1.35σ$. Volume-native retraining at $L=8$ and $12$ improves both the proposal displacement and autocorrelation. The integrated autocorrelation times of the energy and vortex densities remain below two for all volumes studied. These results demonstrate that a Metropolis-corrected diffusion sampler can be self-trained without configurations drawn in advance from the target coupling.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: Uses score-based diffusion model for sampling
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 使用基于分数的扩散模型进行采样
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 使用基于分数的扩散模型进行采样
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 使用基于分数的扩散模型进行采样
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: This paper presents a self-learning diffusion model for lattice configuration generation that trains a score-based diffusion sampler without external data using a bootstrap procedure, achieving agreement with Hybrid Monte Carlo.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 本文提出一种自学习扩散模型SLDiffusion用于格子场构型生成，无需外部训练数据。通过自举过程从beta=0开始，使用固定学习得分的周期性高斯提议和Metropolis-Hastings校正，逐步训练得分网络。在二维XY模型上，该方法在beta=0.5时与独立混合蒙特卡洛计算结果一致，验证了自我训练的有效性。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 本文提出一种自学习扩散模型SLDiffusion用于格子场构型生成，无需外部训练数据。通过自举过程从beta=0开始，使用固定学习得分的周期性高斯提议和Metropolis-Hastings校正，逐步训练得分网络。在二维XY模型上，该方法在beta=0.5时与独立混合蒙特卡洛计算结果一致，验证了自我训练的有效性。
